name: Animated Grid Pattern
description: A grid pattern background with animated squares that fade in and out randomly, creating a dynamic and subtle background effect.
whenToUse: Use as a background for hero sections, feature sections, or any area that needs a subtle animated grid pattern.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of each grid cell in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of each grid cell in pixels

props.name: numSquares
props.description: Number of animated squares visible at a time

props.name: maxOpacity
props.description: Maximum opacity of the animated squares

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in seconds for each square
